name: Mahjong Expedition
short_description: In each Mahjong round, strive for high scores to advance. At the start of each run, choose a city and collect tiles, items, characters, and other elements based on its unique rules. Upgrade and combine them into powerful strategies to clear stages.
detailed_description:
Gameplay:
Calculate scores based on tile patterns and bonuses after each winning hand, using "Blood River" rules. Play until reaching the target score or exhausting draw attempts.

Progression:
After clearing Chengdu, unlock another city. Conquer each city to gradually illuminate the world.

Features:

  • Authentic Mahjong rules—only winning hands score. Rogue-like mechanics ensure unique runs.

  • Unlock 100 global cities, each with distinct rules and mechanics.

  • Higher difficulty clears expand a city's influence zone, allowing free unlocks within it.

  • Collect and upgrade characters with unique skills to test your strategy.

  • Equip artifacts to enhance characters' power.

  • Attach effects to individual tiles for deeper customization.

  • Upgrade tile patterns to boost their potency.

Planned Updates:

  • New character designs

  • New artifact designs

  • New city mechanics

  • New challenge tile decks

supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, Russian, Japanese, Traditional Chinese
